CreateDownloadTask.name: Download task name
CreateDownloadTask.logStreamName: Log stream name, default: download from all log streams
CreateDownloadTask.query: Search query, default: download all data
CreateDownloadTask.queryStartTime: Log start time, UTC, ISO8601 format, e.g. 2020-01-10T13:23:34Z
CreateDownloadTask.queryEndTime: Log end time, UTC, ISO8601 format, e.g. 2020-01-10T13:23:34Z
CreateDownloadTask.format: Download file format, default: json, supports json and csv
CreateDownloadTask.limit: Number of log lines to download, default: 1000000, max: 1000000
CreateDownloadTask.order: Sort order, default: desc (reverse chronological), supports desc and asc
CreateDownloadTask.fileDir: BOS directory for the downloaded file; defaults to the BLS resource account's download directory (not visible to users); if specified, the file is placed in the user's own BOS directory — the bucket must exist, the directory will be created automatically if it does not exist
